title: Topographic Session State
description: Accumulated identity field data across a cartographic conversation. Updated after every user turn.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for this cartographic session

current_block.description: Active phase of the five-block cartographic architecture. Phases recur and nest — this is the current dominant phase.

interaction_mode.description: Current probe mode selected by the cartographer based on field_state

field_state.description: Real-time estimate of field dynamics. Determines cartographic window status.

xi.description: Stochastic fluctuation — how much the field is being perturbed. High xi: field is mobile. Low xi: field is stable, conversation produces narrative not data.

beta.description: Attractor depth — how strongly the current configuration resists change. High beta: deep attractor, strong resistance. Low beta: shallow, mobile.

xi_signals.description: What produced the current xi estimate. E.g. 'length changed sharply', 'topic shifted without transition', 'answered question with question'

beta_signals.description: What produced the current beta estimate. E.g. 'returned to same frame after probe', 'over-justified choice', 'escaped scenario with autobiography'

dmes.description: Four identity field vectors. Hypotheses updated each turn as evidence accumulates.

direction.description: D — gravitational orientation of the field. Where does the person move toward when narration is unavailable?

hypothesis.description: Current best model of D-vector. Null until first signal observed.

confidence.description: 0.0 = no data, 0.2 = partial signal, 0.6 = consistent pattern, 1.0 = confirmed across multiple blocks

signals.description: Interpreted observations in cartographer's own words. Not quotes — structural readings.

meaning.description: M — what carries weight. What is numinous enough to elaborate, too costly to approach?

expression.description: E — how the field presents itself. Register, tone, what it conceals.

state.description: S — current activation level. Depth of current attractor basin.

faces.description: Identified attractor configurations. A Face crystallises when the same configuration appears across multiple blocks — not in a single pass.

label.description: Descriptive name for this configuration. Not a personality type — a topographic label.

dmes_snapshot.description: DMES coordinates at the moment this Face is most active

depth_beta.description: Estimated attractor depth for this Face. High = strongly resistant to change.

first_seen_turn.description: Turn number when this configuration first appeared

confirmed_across_blocks.description: Which blocks this Face has appeared in. Minimum 2 blocks = confirmed attractor.

antipode_hypothesis.description: The configuration this Face moves away from, suppresses, or routes around. Null until localised. Required for Duality Principle.

uncharted_zones.description: Areas of the topology not yet covered. Drives next_probe_target. E.g. 'M-vector has no signal', 'no shadow Face visible yet', 'beta estimate uncertain'

next_probe_target.description: What the next probe is designed to illuminate. E.g. 'direction under pressure', 'antipode of face_1', 'expression when stakes are low'

completeness.description: MVP stopping criterion. Map is presentable when ready_to_map is true.

faces_found.description: True when at least 2 distinct Face configurations identified

face_confirmed.description: True when at least 1 Face confirmed across 2 or more blocks

duality_satisfied.description: True when at least 1 Face has a non-null antipode_hypothesis

all_dmes_partial.description: True when all four DMES vectors have confidence > 0.2

ready_to_map.description: True when all four conditions above are met. Next move is map presentation, not probe.
